title: [FORK] Twilight Forest Thread Safety Addon
description: Fix compatibility issues between C2MEF and Twilight Forest & Make TF generation thread-safe and faster
body:
# TwilightForest Thread Safety Addon for 1.20.1 Forge

This mod is an unofficial fork of TwilightForest Thread Safety Addon made by ishlandmc.

It makes [C2MEF](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2mef) or [C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) + [Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector) (C2ME + Connector is not fully tested) working with Twilight Forest on Forge 1.20.1 by making Twilight Forest generation thread-safe and faster.
